description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages lint, unit_test, integration_test, and deploy, using a pip cache at $PIP_CACHE_DIR keyed by $CI_PROJECT_ID and defining variables PIP_CACHE_DIR, TWINE_REPOSITORY, and TWINE_REPOSITORY_URL. In the lint stage add a pep8 job using the python:3.4 image that runs "tox -e pep8". In the unit_test stage add test_py27_unit (python:2.7) and test_py34_unit (python:3.4) jobs, each with before_script "pip install --upgrade pip setuptools" and "pip install tox codecov", then script "tox -e py27 -- -m unit" (or "tox -e py34 -- -m unit") followed by "codecov -F unittests". In the integration_test stage add test_py27_integration (python:2.7) and test_py34_integration (python:3.4) jobs with the same before_script, then script "tox -e py27 -- -m integration" (or "tox -e py34 -- -m integration") and "codecov -F integrationtests". In the deploy stage add a pages job using python:3.4 that runs "tox -e build-docs" then "mv docs/_build/html/ public/", publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, runs only on the master branch and deploys to the production environment via GitLab Pages, and also add an upload_pypi2 job using python:2.7 with before_script "pip install twine" that builds source and universal wheel packages with "python setup.py sdist" and "python setup.py bdist_wheel --universal", registers and uploads them to the test PyPI repository using twine, and runs only on tag pushes.
